cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out where the father and daughter were when the disaster happened. The question is asking what they were doing when the snowstorm hit. Looking at the passage, it says that Makoto picked his daughter up from a school where she was being looked after while he was at work. So he was taking her home after school. Then he called someone (probably family or friends) to say his truck was stuck in the snow, and that they would walk the remaining kilometers. They were found 300 meters from the truck. Let me look at the options: (A) returning home after visiting s – "s" might be a typo, maybe "family" or "relatives"? But the passage doesn't mention visiting someone, just picking up the daughter from school. (B) just 300 meters away from home – The text says they were found 300 meters from the truck, but not necessarily how far the truck was from home. The truck was stuck, and they were walking from there. So maybe the truck wasn't at home. So this might not be correct. (C) driving home after a visit to a hospital – No, the daughter was taken to the hospital after they were found, but the incident wasn't when they were going there.
